command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Watching for YOUR real message for 60s ==="
LB=$(wc -l < /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log)

# Watch gateway.log live for 60s for any inbound/response
for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "inbound|response ready|flush|error" )
  if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then
    echo "--- activity at +$((i*5))s ---"
    echo "$NEW"
  fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Final: all new gateway.log lines ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log 2>/dev/null | tail -25

echo ""
echo "=== Telegram pending/error after your message ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin).get('result',{})
print('pending:', d.get('pending_update_count'), '| last_error:', repr(d.get('last_error_message')), '| err_date:', d.get('last_error_date'))
"
REMOTE
